calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-029/MECH-256 single-pass comparator: forward-model capacity lift (hidden_dim 128->256) + emit_outcome conformance
items.note: 537b ran on Mac 2026-05-08T18:02Z and produced FAIL non_contributory (UNKNOWN-classified due to missing emit_outcome): p2_grad=False on all 3 seeds at p2_steps=48000 (max windows fully exhausted), p2_r2 ceiling 0.65-0.76, harm_forward_r2 0.59-0.66. Decouple-curricula did not recover EXQ-195's 0.91. 537c lifts forward-model hidden_dim 128->256 to address the capacity ceiling. Other config unchanged (training curriculum stays decoupled; P3 eval curriculum ON). Also adds the emit_outcome runner-conformance hook that 537b was missing.
